name: Chickpeas Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 small can (6 oz) tomato paste, optional
1 can chick peas, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Start the pasta water boiling before you begin assembling the sauce ingredients.
2. Add a small amount of spaghetti sauce to a pan and sauté the garlic in it.
3. Mash half of the chick peas into the pan.
4. Combine all remaining ingredients (tomato paste, soy milk, nutritional yeast, drained chick peas, garlic, and basil) in a saucepan.
5. Cook down until desired thickness is reached, using soy milk to thin if necessary.
6. Heat through and serve over cooked pasta with kale.
7. Tear up fresh kale leaves/stalks and add about 3 minutes before the pasta is done.
8. Drain the pasta/kale mixture and serve with sauce.
